Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when consolidated-transfer-auth Lambda has errors
Alert when consolidated-transfer-auth Lambda is throttled
Alert when consolidated-transfer-auth Lambda p99 duration exceeds 8000ms (~80% of timeout)
Alert when opendental-proxy Lambda has errors
Alert when opendental-proxy Lambda is throttled
Alert when opendental-proxy Lambda p99 duration exceeds 96000ms (~80% of timeout)

ConsolidatedTransferServerEndpoint.Description: Consolidated Transfer Family SFTP endpoint for all clinics

ConsolidatedTransferServerBucket.Description: S3 bucket for consolidated SFTP files

ConsolidatedTransferServerId.Description: Transfer Family server ID for use in other stacks

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
